name: Chocolate Coconut Crunch Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Almonds (lightly salted, dry roasted, finely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. In a medium bowl with an electric mixer, cream the butter and sugars until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in the eggs, vanilla, and almond extract.
5. Mix on low speed until blended.
6. Add the flour mixture and mix just until blended; do not overmix.
7. Add the coconut, chocolate chips, and almonds, stirring just until blended.
8. Drop rounded tablespoon-sized portions of dough about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
9. Bake for 18 to 20 minutes.
